description:
The Value::Jit and Value::JitPoly variants are constructed ONLY in src/jit.rs, which is gated #![cfg(any())] per the .11.9 cutover (verified — never compiled). The variants ARE matched in 4 live places:

- src/eval.rs:222 — Value::Jit(_) | Value::JitPoly(_) => Err(...) error path
- src/ast_value.rs:337-338 — kind_str returns "jit-fn" / "jit-poly-fn"
- src/ir_interp.rs:515-516 — analogous variant-name printer
- src/value.rs:300-301 — Display impl

Plus the helper structs JitFn (src/value.rs:52) and JitPolyFn (src/value.rs:61).

## Scope

- Delete Value::Jit and Value::JitPoly variants.
- Delete the 4 corresponding match arms (each match becomes exhaustive without them — confirm with cargo build).
- Delete the JitFn and JitPolyFn structs (no callers outside of cfg-disabled jit.rs).
- Leave the rest of value.rs intact: Value is still the live representation for Interp::call_named.

## Verify before deletion

- grep for JitFn / JitPolyFn outside of jit.rs / aot.rs / codegen.rs / test_support.rs (the cfg-disabled set) confirms zero live consumers.
- cargo build clean after the change.
- cargo test green.

## Deliverable

-7 warnings (2 variants + 2 fields fn_ptr/fallback + 1 method len + 2 struct-level not-used). One commit.
title: Drop Value::Jit and Value::JitPoly variants + matched arms + helper structs
